title: Orebro Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Orebro, with a Z-Score of -3.46. This event has been rated as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10
body:
The current temperature in Orebro has dropped significantly, resulting in a Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 13.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 76%, with a moderate wind speed of 9.7 km/h. 
 The city is experiencing a severe cold snap, with no Cooling Degree Days (CDD) recorded, indicating no need for cooling
